creator: freebsd@bengrimm.net
text:
Commit 7.1.0.62_6 of 28 Jul 2023 triggers removal of ImageMagick7-nox11 7.1.0.62_5 (and its pecl-imagick-7 friend).

This is the output of a dry package update on one of our servers (it goes for every server where ImageMagick is installed). The packages are built by our local poudriere.

I can see no other trigger for this sudden removal than this commit ("Bump jpeg-turbo users treewide; New major version 3.0.0")
